DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2 BECAUSE IT IS PREEMPTED. OVERRULED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 BECAUSE THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES THAT PLAINTIFF FILED AN ADMINISTRATIVE COMPLAINT. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/AL)
